mapper.sql: id, name, parent_id, icon, sort, status, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_category WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM t_category WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_category (id, name, parent_id, icon, sort, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{parentId}, #{icon}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_category
name = #{name}, parent_id = #{parentId}, icon = #{icon}, sort = #{sort}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE t_category SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
